subcodes.first_line: O thou heart consumed by divine separation! That Promised Beauty, the King of all desire, the Sovereign of existence, hath lifted His veil and rent asunder the coverings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلسوخته هجران الهی آن جمال موعود ملیک مقصود سلطان وجود کشف نقاب و هتک حجاب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
